  • Committees
  • Committee Details

Committee Details

Interim Joint Committee
Education

Jurisdiction

Matters pertaining to public elementary, secondary, and higher education; the State Board of Education; the State Department of Education; the powers and duties of local boards of education; conduct of schools; attendance; state support of education; operation of school districts, teachers' qualifications and tenure; the school curriculum; teachers' retirement; school employees; pupil transportation; school property and buildings; vocational education and rehabilitation; state universities and colleges; community colleges; regional education; and educational television.

Legislative Members

  • Stephen West - (S) - Co-Chair
  • Scott Lewis - (H) - Co-Chair
  • James Tipton - (H) - Co-Chair

  • David P. Givens - (S)
